name: Suckling Pork
steps: Wash, clean inside out. Split suckling pig in half. Blow torch all hair away.
Place pig over the sink on the rack and pour piping hot water all over the skin.
Pat pork dry from inside out, slit the knees and tie back with butcher strings.
Spice rub: Garlic 5 cloves, Ginger 1/5 knob roughly chopped both and Sichuan salt.
Use spice mix, Sichuan salt rub outside the pork and inside, inside the pork only use ginger and garlic rub.
After marinated, place pork flat skin side up and leave to marinate in walking fridge for 4 hours.
Once marinated, wipe the skin side only with jaycloth and brush with vinegar liquor.
Apply evenly everywhere on the skin and do 2 times. After, place skin up on gastro tray and leave in blast chiller until skin will be dry and absorbed all mixture.
After service is over, make sure your josper stays hot at 150 C. Brush off all spices, ginger and garlic off.
Place pig skin up in shallow 1/1 gastro tray in josper at 160 C with door closed.
Next morning, take pork out of the josper and place in rational oven at 290 C without head.
Make sure you cook pork until skin gets nice brown color and crispy.
Take pig from rational time to time to brush with peanut oil.
Head: the ears and nose need to be covered by foil.
